vocab.meaning: địa hình đẹp đến ngạt thở
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to mountainous regions with breathtaking topography that challenges my photographic skills.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ của thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Photos can rarely do justice to the natural grandeur of the Grand Canyon, but I still try to capture its scale.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (thời điểm ánh sáng đẹp nhất để chụp ảnh)
vocab.example: I always aim to shoot during the golden hour to bathe the landscape in a warm, ethereal glow.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh nguyên sơ, chưa bị tác động
vocab.example: Traveling to remote islands allows me to document unspoilt scenery that feels like a world away from civilization.

vocab.meaning: tường thuật bằng hình ảnh, câu chuyện qua ảnh
vocab.example: By focusing on the small details within a vast view, I try to create a more compelling visual narrative.

vocab.meaning: điểm quan sát thuận lợi, góc nhìn đẹp
vocab.example: I hiked for three hours to reach a high vantage point that offered a 360-degree view of the valley.

vocab.meaning: mô tả một cách sống động
vocab.example: High-resolution cameras allow us to vividly depict the intricate textures of a rugged cliffside.
Some of my best scenery shots were taken when I happened to stumble upon a hidden waterfall by accident.
I often take photos of still lakes to capture the sense of absolute serenity that they evoke.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: While the view is important, clever post-processing can truly bring out the hidden colors of a dramatic sky.
